info.title: Koda Control Plane API
info.description: Maintained public contract for platform setup, control-plane product configuration, and runtime access.

200.description: Supervisor is healthy
Compatibility page that points operators to the Next.js dashboard setup flow
This document
Current quickstart, provider, agent, and storage status
Versioned onboarding_readiness.v1 checks for provider, runtime, sandbox, MCP, memory, channel, first task, first trace, docs, and release quality.

post.summary: Create a safe first task for onboarding

201.description: A dashboard first-task request was queued through the normal runtime path.

200.description: Provider, access, and optional agent configured
Current auth mode, owner bootstrap requirements, and active operator session details when authenticated.
Returns a short-lived owner registration token.

201.description: Returns a setup code and expiry for local/VPS pairing.

post.summary: Create the first local owner account

201.description: Creates the owner account and returns a fresh operator session.

post.summary: Create an operator session from local credentials

200.description: Returns a fresh operator session.
The current operator session was revoked.
Lists API/CLI tokens issued by the current operator.

201.description: Creates a new API/CLI token for the current operator.

200.description: The operator API token was revoked.
Lists active and recent sessions for the current operator.
The selected operator session was revoked.
System settings payload
Updated system settings

General settings payload used by the dashboard. Includes provider connections, connection-default toggles, and global settings. Per-agent integration grants remain part of each agent spec under resource_access_policy.integration_grants.

Updated general settings payload. Global settings can enable integration surfaces, but canonical core connection state lives under the connection-default routes and per-agent authorization still lives in each agent spec.
Catalog of connection-capable integrations and servers, including canonical connection keys, ownership, auth strategies, and official support metadata.
System-level default connections keyed by connection_key. Local/core capabilities use keys such as core:browser; third-party SaaS/cloud integrations use mcp:<server_key>.
Canonical default connection payload including status, auth_method, account metadata, field payloads, and connection capabilities.
Updated default connection payload. This stores connection material at the system level but does not grant agent access by itself.
Disconnected default connection payload with status reset to not_configured.
Provider connection details including connection_status, checked_via, auth_expired, account labels, and verification metadata.
Updated provider connection
Updated provider connection
Verification result including verification.verified, checked_via, auth_expired, account labels, and the refreshed provider connection payload.
Supertonic model catalog with local download status, bytes on disk, active download jobs, and acceleration metadata.

202.description: Provider download job for the requested Supertonic model.

400.description: Unknown model id or invalid request.

200.description: Updated Supertonic model status after deleting local assets.

400.description: Model download is active or the model id is invalid.

get.summary: List Supertonic preset and custom voices

200.description: Supertonic voice catalog with preset/custom metadata, selected model/language, local download status, and active jobs.

202.description: Provider download job for copying the selected Supertonic voice style into Koda-managed storage.

400.description: Unknown voice, missing model snapshot, or invalid request.

200.description: Delete result for a preset voice copy or imported custom voice JSON.

400.description: Voice download is active or the request is invalid.

post.summary: Import a Supertonic Voice Builder JSON file

400.description: Missing file, oversized upload, invalid JSON, or invalid voice style payload.

200.description: Verification result including verification.verified, checked_via, auth_expired, details, and the refreshed default connection payload.
Recent health checks for the integration, including connection_status, status transitions such as verified or degraded, checked timestamps, and probe details.
Candidate local roots the operator can browse from the workspace import flow.
Directory entries after root validation, symlink escape checks, and ignored-folder filtering.

post.summary: Scan a workspace directory for importable config

200.description: workspace_config_scan.v1 preview with detected sources, redacted excerpts, risk labels, blocked execution findings, and scan hash. The operation is non-mutating.

post.summary: Create a workspace from a scanned folder

201.description: Created workspace, scan preview, and import result. Only explicitly selected safe sources are applied.

200.description: Updated workspace scan metadata and workspace_config_scan.v1 payload.
Import result with applied prompt blocks, paused agent drafts, disabled MCP candidates, skipped review-only sources, and conflicts.

The channel identity was allowed for future messages.

post.description: Runs deterministic skill_eval.v1 checks from package eval_case.v1 metadata and updates recommendation/trust fields on the skill_lock.v1 payload.
